God objects identified as classes exceeding 500 lines with clear multi-responsibility signals.",
  "summary": "Freqtrade has significant scalability concerns concentrated in a few critical areas. The Exchange class (4,036 lines) and FreqtradeBot (2,584 lines) are the two largest god objects in production code, both flagged with deep nested loop structures (up to 7 levels in enter_positions). The persistence layer (trade_model.py with 4 classes spanning 2,162 lines) forms the tightest coupling hub — Trade.commit (fan_in 237), Trade.get_trades (fan_in 73), and Order.parse_from_ccxt_object (fan_in 190) are used across virtually every subsystem. The datetime_helpers module (dt_now at fan_in 544, dt_utc at fan_in 359) is an extreme dependency magnet. Complexity peaks at 24 (get_markets) and 23 (time_pair_generator), both above the maintainability threshold. Test infrastructure (conftest.py at 3,463 lines, conftest functions with 431+ callers) shows testing is heavily fixture-coupled. The 9 identified god objects all exceed 1,000 lines except where noted, and their extraction into smaller modules is the single highest-impact refactoring opportunity."
